# BP-37 negative: read-only map and shadowed local are not global writes
lang: go
file: BP-37-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

var staticRegistry = map[string]string{"first": "one"}
var counter int

func lookup(key string) string {
	return staticRegistry[key]
}

func bump(counter int) int {
	counter++
	return counter
}

func shadowedOnly(value int) {
	{
		counter := 0
		counter++
	}
	for counter := 0; counter < 1; counter++ {
		counter++
	}
	switch value {
	case 1:
		counter := 0
		counter++
	}
	switch counter := any(value).(type) {
	case int:
		counter++
	}
}
